entity.summary: Base decentralized exchange using weighted liquidity pools and explicit swap, taker, weight-breaking, and slippage fee components for token trading and protocol revenue distribution.
entity.notes: The first-party domain remains reachable but currently presents limited public product copy. Active classification therefore relies on current Base factory and pool discovery plus current Swap events and fee fields tracked from deployed contracts. No exact initial launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Ryze Protocol official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party domain preserves the Ryze Protocol identity and links its protocol documentation, although the public landing copy remains limited.

evidence.title: Ryze Protocol DEX volume and fees adapter
evidence.notes: Current-running adapter discovers pools from the deployed Base factory and tracks Swap events, volume, and swap, taker, weight-breaking, and slippage fee components from April 2026 onward.
